meta.title: Validate Your AI Idea in 48 Hours
meta.description: You don’t need weeks to test an AI idea. Use the 48-hour rule: pick one user, one job, build the smallest loop, and watch real users try it. By day two, you’ll have validation or a reason to pivot. In AI, speed of learning beats perfection.
